name: chow mein
description:
A hot bowl of chow mein is being lifted with chopsticks, with steam rising to show it’s freshly cooked.
The noodles are mixed with colorful vegetables and coated in a rich sauce.
The dark background makes the dish look even more tasty and appealing.

name: rose milk
description:
A refreshing glass of rose milk is beautifully presented with a soft pink color.
It is garnished with pistachio pieces and a fresh rose, giving it an elegant look.
The creamy texture and delicate decoration make it look both tasty and soothing.

name: manchurian
description:
A plate of crispy manchurian is coated in a rich, glossy sauce.
It is garnished with fresh spring onions, adding color and flavor.
The dish looks spicy, flavorful, and perfect for a delicious meal.

name: momo
description:
A plate of golden fried momo is neatly arranged in a circle.
They are served with a flavorful dipping sauce placed in the center.
The crispy texture and warm color make them look crunchy and delicious.

name: pani puri
description:
A plate of crispy pani puri is beautifully arranged around a bowl of spicy tangy water.
Each puri is filled with potatoes, chickpeas, and fresh toppings like onions and coriander.
The colorful presentation makes this popular street food look fresh and tempting.

name: cold coco milkshake
description:
A refreshing cold coco milkshake served in elegant glasses, topped with creamy foam and chocolate shavings.
Its rich, smooth texture and chilled chocolate flavor make it a perfect treat for hot days.

name: burger
description:
A juicy double cheeseburger stacked with melted cheese, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions in a sesame bun.
Steam rising from the patty highlights its hot, freshly cooked and mouthwatering appeal.

name: pasta tossed
description:
A creamy penne pasta tossed in a rich, cheesy white sauce and garnished with fresh herbs.
Served with crispy garlic bread, it looks warm, comforting, and full of flavor.

name: pizza
description:
A hot, cheesy pizza with melted mozzarella stretching as a slice is lifted.
Topped with fresh veggies, it looks irresistibly gooey and delicious.
